seoDescription: Explore featured projects and case studies by Aivora.
keywords: Aivora portfolio, AI projects, custom software portfolio, SaaS portfolio
headline: OUR WORK
supportingText: Take a look at some of our recent digital products we design and develop for startups and businesses.

projects.title: E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: We built a real-time analytics dashboard for an online retailer, integrating sales data, customer trends, and inventory management into one platform. It helped the client make data-driven decisions and increase efficiency.
projects.outcome: Improved inventory turnover rate and enabled instant sales forecasting.

projects.title: AI Customer Assistant
projects.description: Developed an intelligent chatbot for a financial services startup to handle common customer inquiries, reducing response time by 60%. The assistant uses natural language understanding to route questions and automate support.
projects.outcome: Reduced support ticket volume by 50% and improved satisfaction.

projects.title: Custom CRM Platform
projects.description: Designed a multi-tenant CRM system for a B2B logistics company with strict data security. The platform aligned with the client’s processes and synchronized sales pipelines across their global team.
projects.outcome: Synchronized global logistics pipeline with zero operational lag.
